{{CargoRelic
|name=Energy Missile
|class_id=22341
|rank=SSS
|affct=TECH
|birthday=08-19
|source=
|description=On Aug 19, 3022 AD, the Energy Missile was completed.<br>The Energy Missile is an expensive explosive ordnance that packs a punch. It boasts a powerful shield generator and multifunctional guidance system, allowing it to automatically lock onto targets while being protected by an all-around energy shield. It can also be operated manually in special situations. When equipped with a proton-scattering warhead, it can unleash a devastatingly powerful blast that outmatches even a starfighter.
|fame=66
|art=55
|fth=71
|civ=61
|tech=109
|ss1=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per 5 Silver Snail Tokens used, Snail ATK +6<br>Per 5 Silver Snail Tokens used, Snail RUSH +6<br>Silver Snail Tokens Used: 100/100
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Per 5 Silver Snail Tokens used, Snail ATK +8<br>Per 5 Silver Snail Tokens used, Snail RUSH +8<br>Silver Snail Tokens Used: 100/100
|ss3=Snail Leadership +5<br>Per 5 Silver Snail Tokens used, Snail ATK +10<br>Per 5 Silver Snail Tokens used, Snail RUSH +10<br>Silver Snail Tokens Used: 100/100
|ss4=Snail Leadership +7<br>Per 5 Silver Snail Tokens used, Snail ATK +14<br>Per 5 Silver Snail Tokens used, Snail RUSH +14<br>Silver Snail Tokens Used: 100/100
|ss5=Snail Leadership +9<br>Per 5 Silver Snail Tokens used, Snail ATK +18<br>Per 5 Silver Snail Tokens used, Snail RUSH +18<br>Silver Snail Tokens Used: 100/100
|ss6=Snail Leadership +12<br>Per 5 Silver Snail Tokens used, Snail ATK +24<br>Per 5 Silver Snail Tokens used, Snail RUSH +24<br>Silver Snail Tokens Used: 100/100
|ss7=Snail Leadership +12<br>Per 5 Silver Snail Tokens used, Snail ATK +24<br>Per 5 Silver Snail Tokens used, Snail RUSH +24<br>Silver Snail Tokens Used: 100/100<br>Snail Leadership +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Koryeo skill III.png|50px]]Place in Koryeon Museum: This Relic's TECH +15
|skill2=[[File:Koryeo skill III.png|50px]]Place in Koryeon Museum: In Koryeo, 2x Orange Card Drops +15%
|skill3=[[File:Koryeo skill III.png|50px]]Place in Koryeon Museum: In Koryeo, Angel Cells gained +30%
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Proton Arm|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Spaceship Captain Frag, +20|orange}}
|3name=Proton Power Furnace|3rec=29.85M|3atk=128737|3defense=85886|3hp=4725175|3weak=18927
|4name=Proton Multi-Gun Turret|4rec=41.00M|4atk=152267|4defense=101583|4hp=6462937|4weak=20127
|5name=Proton Fire Control Radar|5rec=53.34M|5atk=178289|5defense=118944|5hp=8551736|5weak=22399
|6name=Proton Depth Charge|6rec=67.27M|6atk=207672|6defense=138546|6hp=11245940|6weak=27110
|Arec=82.68M|Aatk=240166|Adefense=160224|Ahp=14486775|Aweak=31383
}}}}
